content:
⸻

Readings & Expectations Breakdown

Each module includes a “Readings & Expectations” section. Here’s how to use it:
• Pre-Class Readings (Monday):
• Focus on foundational theories and models (e.g., “Foundations of Writing,” “The Writing Process”).
• Expected Outcome: Understand key concepts that support your prewriting and thesis development.
• Drafting Readings (Tuesday):
• Focus on techniques for developing ideas (e.g., effective transitions, dialogue in narrative writing, structuring a process analysis).
• Expected Outcome: Learn practical strategies for organizing your rough draft.
• Mechanics & Revision Readings (Wednesday & Thursday):
• Focus on grammar, punctuation, APA style (for persuasive essay weeks), and final editing strategies.
• Expected Outcome: Improve clarity, grammar, and overall coherence of your drafts.

⸻

Enhanced Peer Feedback Template
